specific_question: Which regions supplied by Elexion are projected to experience the highest EV delivery delays in Q2 2026?
answer: Elexion internal logistics projections for Q2 2026 indicate that delivery delays will be highest in the Northeast US, where shipments are expected to face delays of up to 12 days due to port congestion and limited local battery inventory.
dr_question: Based on the 2024 report "Trends in electric cars" on iea.org, which developments in battery technology and EV supply chains are likely to impact global production and delivery dynamics by Q2 2026?
